articles.title: Pope Leo criticises Equatorial Guinea prisons as he winds up Africa tour - BBC
articles.description: The Pope gives a frank and passionate speech, the likes of which have characterised his tour of Africa.
articles.content: He addressed the Central African nation on Wednesday at a Mass that drew some 100,000 people, including Teodoro Obiang Nguema Mbasogo, the country's leader and the world's long-serving president.

articles.author: Natalie Muller
articles.title: China hails countries for blocking Taiwan president's flight - DW.com
articles.description: Taiwan's president canceled a planned trip to Eswatini after three African countries revoked permission for his plane to fly through their airspace. Beijing has denied pressuring the countries to block the flight.
articles.content:
China said Wednesday it had "high appreciation" for the African countries that denied overflight rights to the plane of Taiwanese President Lai Ching-te, forcing him to cancel a trip to Eswatini.
